title: MiuxuE's Quirky Workshop
description: Welcome to MiuxuE's Quirky Workshop, a Minecraft mod series filled with creativity and quirky content!
body:
# Hi 👋 Welcome to **MiuxuE's Quirky Workshop** I've added things I find interesting to this Mod. ## What can it do? - Bring you joy *maybe :) !? - Enchant your hat with the ability to dodge projectiles. - **![potion effect icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d6378c2e54217a50a278d037f24b9c89f6423e.png)** Add a "![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a554e69c0d0ad5557563878a7960c44e0fb51604.png)Clock" to the brewing stand to brew a potion that eliminates invulnerability after taking damage. ... ## Dependencies To ensure that "MiuxuE's Quirky Workshop" runs properly, you need to make sure you have the following prerequisites installed: - **Fabric Language Kotlin**: Get details [on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin). - **Fabric API**: Visit [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for more information. Additionally, for compatibility, please ensure your client meets the following requirements: - **fabric-loader**: The version should not be lower than `0.15.11`. - **minecraft**: Use the `1.21` version. # Suggestions Hey, if you have fun gameplay or ideas, feel free to share them with me on my [BILIBILI channel](https://space.bilibili.com/3493297012082914/), and I'll incorporate your ideas into the Mod! ## Bugs If there are any bugs in the Mod, don't panic, send the bug report to my [BILIBILI channel](https://space.bilibili.com/3493297012082914/) via private message, and I will fix it! ## My Channel
中文 欢迎来到 **MiuxuE的奇趣工坊(MiuxuE's Quirky Workshop)** 我将我觉得有趣的东西加入到了这个Mod中 ## 它能做什么? - 给你带来快乐 *或许 :) !? - 给你的帽子附魔,让你拥有躲避弹射物的能力 - ![potion effect icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d6378c2e54217a50a278d037f24b9c89f6423e.png)在酿造台中加入"![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a554e69c0d0ad5557563878a7960c44e0fb51604.png)钟",炼制一种可以消除受伤后无敌时间的药水 ... ## 依赖项 为了让“MiuxuE的奇趣工坊”正常运行，您需要确保已安装以下基础组件： - **Fabric Language Kotlin**：访问[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)获取详情。 - **Fabric API**：请访问[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)了解更多信息。 此外，为了兼容性，请确认您的客户端符合以下要求： - **fabric-loader**：版本应不低于`0.15.11`。 - **minecraft**：应该使用`1.21`版本。 # 建议 嘿,如果你有有趣的玩法、想法，欢迎在我的[BILIBILI频道](https://space.bilibili.com/3493297012082914/)与我分享，我会将你的想法加入到Mod中! ## BUG 如果Mod出现了一些Bug,不要慌,将bug发送到我的[BILIBILI频道](https://space.bilibili.com/3493297012082914/)私信中,我会修好它的!
